case_title: JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC VS. ANDREW BRADFORD ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADFORD, ANDREW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET #310 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75000538)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRADFORD, ANDREW DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75000538), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC SERVED OCT-19-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRADFORD, ANDREW
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BRADFORD, ANDREW
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75000538) AS TO DEFENDANT BRADFORD, ANDREW
DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75000538) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $40/DAY (TRANSACTION ID # 75000538) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRADFORD, ANDREW DOES 1 TO 10
VERIFICATION BY LANLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 75000538) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JALA SAI INVESTMENTS LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75000538) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BRADFORD, ANDREW
